---
title: "BDNF/TrkB signalling in CNS neurodegeneration"
date: 2026-06-30
categories: [neuropharmacology, CNS, BDNF]
description: "Summary of the signalling cascade and therapeutic implications."
---

## Why I read this

...

## Key findings

...

## What I didn't understand / want to follow up on

...

## How it connects to my own work

...

## Citation
